LooKHAS: KHAS People Explain KHAS Best

It is time to highlight the creativity and digital communication skills of everyone who is a member of our university (including students, academic staff and administrative staff)!

All you have to do is shoot a video with your mobile phone on a unique topic that draws attention to the KHAS Education Model or the unique features of our school.

Your video,

In vertical screen format,

Maximum length of 120 seconds,

Must be suitable for publication on social media.

You can send your application videos to

[email protected]

until December 27, 2023. Who knows, maybe your project will be the new face of KHAS!

The top three will be presented with gift packages worth 2000 TL, 1500 TL and 1000 TL from 3414.

Quick Search

Through this form, you can access news, announcements, faculties and departments, base scores, our academic staff and administrative personnel, and their internal phone numbers.
